content:
💡 dwm-status-bar | Shell
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users of minimalist window managers with a consolidated, real-time information display on their root window, reducing the need for separate applications or widgets.
✨ Key Features: • Displays weather information from OpenWeatherMap • Shows network upload/download speed using ifstat • Fetches Moscow Exchange (IMOEX) index data • Monitors Claude Code API usage limits
📖 Summary: This repository provides a minimalist status bar for window managers like dwm and dwl. It aggregates various real-time information such as weather, currency exchange rates, stock market indices, API usage limits, network speed, system resource usage (RAM, CPU), battery status, and the current date/time into a single, concise string displayed on the root window.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
